scene.message: Elly: Wasn't Maki in love{nl} with Naito, I wonder?{waitkey}{ret}
Kozai: Huh, wait a sec...{wait_fr:21}{nl} What do you mean?!{waitkey}{ret}
Aki: Nomoraka tanomamaa~!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: It's not a lie.{nl} I love you, Chisato.{waitkey}{ret}
Kozai: You... {wait_fr:48}love me?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Chisato...{waitkey}{ret}
Kozai: Eep, what...?{waitkey}{ret}
Kozai: It's not that!{nl} Don't look, Yosuke!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Um, actually,{nl} Aki put a curse on her...{waitkey}{ret}
Naito: Chisato...!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Ah, the mirror...!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: What's happened?{nl} Why is Naito here?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: A castle?{nl} What's that about!{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: All right, let's go!{nl} Let's find the castle!{waitkey}{ret}
